chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Transfer Application No.S-43 of 2018 Applicant: Ayaz Ali son of Imdad Ali Mugheri, Through Mr.Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate State: Through Mr.Raja Imtiaz Ali Solangi, A.P.G Date of hearing: 03.10.2018 Date of order: 03.10.2018 O R D E R IRSHAD ALI SHAH, J.- The applicant by way of instant application u/s.526 Cr.PC has sought for transfer of his case outcome of FIR Crime No.46/2016, u/s.24 of Sindh Arms Act, of P.S, Taluka from the Court of learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana, to the Court of learned 6th Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana, mainly for the reason that the main case against him was decided by the latter Court. 2. Learned A.P.G recorded no objection. 3. In view of above, the case of the applicant is withdrawn from the Court of leaned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana, and is made over to the Court of learned 6th Additional Sessions Judge, Larkana for its disposal in accordance with law. 4. The instant application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E
